headline: Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL): CVS Health To Roll Out AI-enabled Platform With Google Cloud
summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) is one of the Best Automation Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On March 5, Reuters reported that CVS Health is expected to roll out an AI-enabled platform. This will be done in partnership with Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL)’s Google Cloud unit, which will help collect data from diverse sources to support customers […]

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.
